caption: The video begins with a view of a well-lit room featuring a wooden wardrobe and a baby crib on the left side. The camera then moves forward, focusing on an open door that leads to a modern bathroom. As the camera enters the bathroom, it reveals a spacious shower area enclosed by glass panels, with a sleek design and tiled walls. To the right of the shower, there is a bathtub partially visible, suggesting a luxurious and contemporary setup. The overall ambiance of the space is clean and inviting, with natural light filtering through the window blinds, enhancing the brightness of the room.
